title: Psammophiliella bellidifolia
taxonomy: Psammophiliella bellidifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is a type of succulent. As a succulent, Psammophiliella bellidifolia has adapted to live in arid environments, storing water in its leaves. The plant is also known for its ability to survive in poor soil conditions. Psammophiliella bellidifolia is a member of the subfamily Asphodeloideae.
